title: SQL: relaxing subqueries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO users (name, age) VALUES ((SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM users), 'Charlie', NULL);
INSERT INTO users (name, age) VALUES ('David', COALESCE((SELECT MAX(age) FROM users), 0) + 1, 35);
key_bug_features: subquery in insert statement with max function
